backlog.description: Improve stat-box visual design — needs more polish, better spacing, subtle background, shadow refinement
Add visual diversity — improve blockquote/callout styling for Key Takeaway sections
Mobile card layout needs spacing fixes — category pills overflow on small screens
H2 headings need stronger visual hierarchy — consider larger size or weight adjustment
Dark mode contrast audit — verify all components meet WCAG AA 4.5:1 ratio
Footer layout needs polish — improve spacing, link grouping, visual balance
Table of contents styling improvements — better indentation, active state, scroll behavior
Breadcrumb visual design — improve separator, spacing, and hover states
Newsletter subscription form styling — improve input field and button design
Cookie banner polish — improve visual integration with site design
Home hero section — improve engagement with better typography and CTA visibility
Category filter tab styling — improve active state indicator and spacing
Code block syntax highlighting and styling improvements
375px phone breakpoint audit — verify all components render properly on small screens
Page load performance — verify image lazy loading, optimize CSS delivery
H2 headings in article body use 1.5rem (24px) — consider increasing to 1.75rem (28px) for better visual hierarchy and readability on desktop; mobile H2 should remain fluid
Card excerpts truncate at 3 lines (via -webkit-line-clamp: 3) — on 375px screens, this creates inconsistent card heights; consider 2-line clamp on mobile
Footer grid switches to 1-column on 768px, but gap reduces from 3rem to 2rem — consider more aggressive mobile footer restructuring (logo + RSS on top, then links grid below)
